programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha gets worried as Bawri gets late for their date. He goes to Bawri's house to check on her but finds that her house is locked.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bawari's refusal to speak with Bagha leaves him disappointed. Later, Jethalal and Nattu Kaka hope to do something to cheer Bagha up.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is left anxious after he receives an order he might not be able to fulfil. Later, he considers seeking Taarak's help in finding a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Bagha runs away from home and cannot be reached on his phone. Elsewhere, Jethalal has concerns of his own as he struggles to finish his orders on time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society are stunned when they witness Bagha's body language. Later, things get worse when he utters lines from popular movies.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A drunk Baaga runs riot across Gokuldham society as the society members try to contain him. Eventually, Baaga reaches the first floor and threatens to jump off the balcony.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Bagha's reckless behaviour continues, Taarak and Anjali try to find a way for him to come downstairs.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An intoxicated Bagha's conduct becomes a nuisance for the residents of Gokuldham. Later, everyone must get together to find a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha finally takes a sigh of relief when the real Bawri comes in front of him. However, Jethalal is still worried about completing the order on time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal orders Bagha to leave immediately but Bawari stops him. Further, Jethalal discovers that Bagha presented Bawari with a phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal claims that his gold ring has gone missing, Bhide offers to help find it. Later, Bhide is stunned when Jethalal and Abdul are nowhere to be seen.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi tells Bhide that the neighbouring society has experienced some ghostly activities. Meanwhile, Bawri arrives at Gada Electronics to surprise Bag.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide puts up the quote of the day in order to highlight the importance of water, hoping that the members of Gokuldham colony would understand the severity of the situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and his family head out in a cab, while Popatlal is waiting for the plumber. He receives a call asking him to get to the office as soon as possible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A plumber arrives looking for Bhide, because he has left his phone inside the house. But when the plumber says that he could break the lock and enter, the colony children refuse and ask him to wait.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The plumber gets very frustrated as the keys to the lock on Bhide's house are nowhere to be found. Meanwhile, Taarak's boss also seems to have lost his keys.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The situation becomes very chaotic as the frustrated plumber loses his temper and threatens to break open Bhide's lock. However, Abdul suggests an alternate idea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bholaram is upset that he had to spend the entire day searching for the keys. Meanwhile, his wife Sushma arrives at Gokuldham colony and the colony members try to make it up to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While entering the room, Champaklal asks about the bag that contained the decoction, leaving Jethalal perplexed and at a loss for words.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as Bhide forgets the shawl for the chief guest ahead of the function. Later, the residents of Gokuldham taunt him about the matter.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Team CID investigate after a nurse and her doctor boyfriend are found dead in a hospital.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A couple returns home to find their kids missing and the dead body of an unknown woman lying in the house. Meanwhile, Jethalal's photograph is found in a man's house with darts all over it.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Two corpses are found with bullet wounds suggesting that they were shot at point-blank range. However, during the autopsy, to the surprise of the CID team, one of the corpses wakes up.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. Together, they seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to solve various criminal cases.

programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Saloni is happy that her birthday is falling on a Sunday, so that she can have a party at home. Meanwhile, Bhayankar Pari plans to capture Sunday and delete it from everybody's memory.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised to find people enjoying on a Monday inspite of Sunday being a holiday. Later, Baal Veer tries to find the truth behind this.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Kids are tensed as nobody remembers Sunday, the day of the week, except them. Nokili Pari tries to erase the day from the memory of the kids, while Baalveer fights Bhayankar Pari at 'Asmani Parvat'.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide begins to reprimand Tapu Sena, Champaklal intervenes. As Bhide tries to justify himself, Champaklal rebukes him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A new family embarks on their journey in Gokuldham colony. Later, during Ganesh Utsav, they make a heartfelt request to Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Colony buzzes with excitement as festive decorations go up for Bappa's arrival. Later, Tapu Sena intervenes and establishes a set of rules for everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members readily accept Tapu Sena's new rules and start following them right away. Meanwhile, the Binjola kids set their own conditions before anyone can enjoy the prasad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Binjola children refuse to allow anyone to eat the prasad until Bappa receives his portion. Soon, this causes an escalating situation among the colony members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Devotees begin complaining that they have not yet received the prasad, sparking tensions. Soon, the situation leads to Bhide being summoned to find a resolution for the issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal attempts to persuade the children to eat and abandon their stubbornness. But soon, a new problem suddenly emerges.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members look forward to Tapu sharing his idea so that they can start the Rangarang program. Later, during the aarti, the plan is set into motion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Veer and Bansri are devastated by what the colony members have done. Soon, the colony members leaves everything up to Bappa.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Lord Ganesh, touched by Veer and Bansri's devotion, accepts their laddoos and appears before them. Afterward, the children gather everyone in the society compound.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members offer their prayers and prasad to Bappa. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena undertakes the distribution of prasad to those on the list.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham society exuberantly celebrates Ganesh Chaturthi, where Popatlal delivers a dazzling performance, followed by a charming performance by the Bhide family.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak recites poetry, and after the performances of the elders, Taapu Sena plans to dazzle everyone with a dance performance.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When Dr Salunkhe examines the body of a man who collapsed while walking, he learns that the victim was infected by a contagious virus. Later, the killer informs the police that he has six hostages.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When the third hostage infected by a deadly virus is released, the CID team must race against time to find the victim. Moreover, they must also find the remaining clues to save the other hostages.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide worries as Sonu has not returned home and is not answering calls. Later, when Goli and Gogi arrive, Bhide leaves to find Sonu himself.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and the others worry about the future of their children, including the marriage proposals they have received. But Bhide is particularly worried when he finds that Sonu's phone is switched off.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide learns that Sonu and Tapu have already left the party. So, he heads out on his own to search for them when they do not come home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu confess their love for each other to Bhide. But this revelation leaves Bhide and Madhuri utterly shocked and speechless.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal suggests it is time for Tapu's marriage to Jethalal. Meanwhile, Bhide worries they might ask for Sonu's hand in marriage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide decides to expedite his search for a groom for Sonu when he learns about her and Tapu's relationship. Meanwhile, Bapuji also begins to search for a bride for Tapu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu discover their parents' plans for their arranged marriages to other people. But, both of them refuse the marriage proposals, causing their parents to become concerned.

programme.desc: Gokuldham Society's members recite poems during the Holi celebrations. The group of men set out to execute their plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Plotting revenge on Tapu Sena, Guddu hatches a plan to cause trouble during the Holi celebrations in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Gokuldham Society joyfully celebrates Holi, Guddu and his group focus on Sonu, planning to put colour on her specifically.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi finds himself in trouble as the black marketers of medicines corner him and overhear his conversation with Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal disguises himself in a desperate effort to meet Dr Maalpani, but he is left baffled after finding out that Dr Maalpani has left.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After failing to perform a sting operation on the black marketers, Popatlal decides to give it another shot with Jethalal at the helm of the operation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal tells Jethalal that Rang Tarang Resort needs 200 TVs and refrigerators for its rooms. Jethalal becomes ecstatic at the prospect of getting this huge order.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On Popatlal's insistence, Jethalal decides to leave for the resort as per their plan. He also takes Bagha and Champaklal along for support.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal sets off for the resort. Popatlal rings to enquire about his whereabouts, but the former plays a prank on him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Popatlal and Bharti eagerly wait for Jethalal to touch down at the resort, they believe that a waiter is keeping an eye on them. Jethalal and Champaklal enjoy the journey to the resort.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally arrives at the resort. Popatlal feels upset when he realises that Champaklal and Bagha have tagged along.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhvi scolds her daughter for being on the phone while they are looking for Bhide's screw. Champaklal scolds Jethalal when he starts bantering with Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide wants to fix his broken glasses and avoids spending money, but Madhavi insists on him getting a new pair.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide almost drops his new glasses when the Tapu Sena are playing. However, when he finds his glasses broken later, he blames them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide gives the culprit the chance to come clean. However, Tapu has an alibi, and Jethalal is sure he is innocent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is about to punish Tapu when Sonu confesses her mistake. Bhide is furious and heart-broken that Sonu is scared of him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham's men plan a secret New Year's party at Popatlal's house, but Champaklal ends up drinking by mistake.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gadas invite some members of the society to join their trip to Kutch. Jethalal is upset about Goli joining them without his permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham residents travel to Kutch and all are excited about the journey. Jethalal tries his best to find a seat next to Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham residents reach Kutch and Jethalal and Champaklal share various information about the region. All are happy with the beauty of Kutch and arrangements made for Kutch Rann Utsav.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everybody gets up early in the morning to watch the beautiful sunrise and take a ride in the hot-air balloon before visiting the BSF camp.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everybody takes part in the aarti of Godess Aashapura Mata in Kutch and buy souvenirs for other Gokuldham members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder's assistant comes with the construction equipment but problem arises when Dr Hathi falls into mud. Jethalal and Daya decide to buy a plot in Kutch and meet an agent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide makes frequent calls to Jethalal and disturbs him while he is discussing details of the plot with the agent. The residents of Gokuldham wear traditional clothes worn by the people of Kutch.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar's assistant starts maintenance work in the society. Bhide informs the residents about the new safety rules to be followed during the process.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and the others arrive in Kutch and go to a local hotel to have lunch. Iyer is not happy with the sweet food, but Jethalal takes up the challenge to ensure that he enjoys the food.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While enjoying the camel ride with his family and friends, Jethalal's camel takes a different direction and he goes missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police and BSF try to investigate and find Jethalal. Daya becomes restless as the situation gets worse. Jethalal crosses the border and reaches Pakistan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pakistani officers interrogate Jethalal. Daya and the rest get news of Jethalal being held captive in Pakistan. Taarak calls up Sodhi and comes to know about Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and the family pray for Jethalal's return. The Pakistani authorities decide to put Jethalal in jail. Jethalal answers Bollywood-related queries from other inmates.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With no update on Jethalal's status, the BSF officer suggests that everyone return home. However, everyone is infuriated with the idea and refuses to budge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal, Daya and Sodhi decide to go to Delhi and seek help from higher authorities. The residents back at Gokuldham worry about Jethalal's safe return.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Vicky and Mona reach a critical point in their Gokuldham Society heist, Popatlal unexpectedly spots them in the compound.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Vicky and Mona successfully carry out their plan to rob Gokuldham Society, managing to escape with the stolen jewellery.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham faces a harrowing ordeal as thieves make off with valuables in broad daylight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul apprehends the jewellery thieves as they attempt to flee and returns them to Gokuldham. The police arrive to make arrests, but Inspector Pandey appears disgruntled.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal learns about the robbery and praises Inspector Pandey for catching the robbers. Bhide and Popatlal receive gifts from a mysterious benefactor.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sanjana is in for a shock as Popatlal confesses his love for her in public. She eventually finds herself at a loss of words to respond to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sanjana speaks with Popatlal over the phone and professes her love for him. She promises to introduce him to her father and requests him to meet her at the reception.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha, Jethalal and Champaklal try to turn the tables on Sanjana to free Popatlal. The trio is shocked as Sanjana refuses to budge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Sanjana talks to her boss about their plan, Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha overhear her. The trio confronts Sanjana about her intentions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha find themselves in trouble when the black marketers realise their true identity and try to chase them down.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal finds himself at a major risk of being electrocuted and starts to panic. Jethalal becomes disguised and looks for Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal, Bagha and Champaklal are on the run from the black marketers, the police decide to intervene by visiting the resort.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The black marketers find themselves in trouble when they see police officers waiting outside the resort. They try to laugh their way out to little avail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are worried as the police threaten to arrest them. The police inspector threatens to hand them a strict punishment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as Inspector Pandey and his team begin to find Popatlal's belongings in the resort. Everyone realises that the sting operation has failed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
